_comment: Per-fork whitelist of capitalized tokens the drift scanner should ignore. Add tokens here for: nicknames not present in roster names (e.g., 'Vlad' for 'Vladimir Guerrero Jr.'), manager and GM surnames, coach names, broadcaster names — anyone who shows up in notes.json text but isn't on the active roster. Scanner: tools/scan_notes_drift.py. Registry: docs/free-text-fields.md.
